🫀 Peripheral InterventionREF: PRB

Promesa BMS OTW

Promesa · Peripheral Stents

Over-the-wire bare metal stent with hybrid cell design providing excellent balance of flexibility, conformability and kink resistance. Features high-grade electro polishing and surface finishing for enhanced durability.

MaterialNickel Titanium Alloy
Frequently Asked Questions

Over-the-wire bare metal stent with hybrid cell design providing excellent balance of flexibility, conformability and kink resistance. Features high-grade electro polishing and surface finishing for enhanced durability.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences Pvt. Ltd. and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Promesa BMS OTW, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Promesa BMS OTW is constructed using Nickel Titanium Alloy, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
